---
title: "Psych RA Notebook 01 — Data Cleaning & Descriptives"
author: "Austen Siegler"
output: html_document
---

> Reproducible example of: tidy data import, cleaning, scale construction, reliability, descriptives, and a simple group comparison + plot.
>
> **How to run:** Open in RStudio (or VS Code + R), install packages below, and click *Knit*.

```r
# Packages ----
packages <- c("tidyverse", "janitor", "psych", "broom", "effectsize", "ggplot2")
to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)

set.seed(42)
```

## 1) Simulate a small study dataset

```r
n <- 160
df <- tibble::tibble(
  id = 1001:(1000 + n),
  consent = sample(c(1, 1, 1, 0), n, replace = TRUE),             # some non-consent
  age = round(rnorm(n, 28, 6)),
  gender = sample(c("Woman","Man","Nonbinary","Prefer not to say"), n, replace = TRUE, prob=c(.45,.45,.08,.02)),
  condition = sample(c("Control","Treatment"), n, replace = TRUE),
  # 6-item scale (e.g., PHQ-6 proxy with 1-5 Likert)
  s1 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE),
  s2 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE),
  s3 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE),
  s4 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE),
  s5 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE),
  s6 = sample(1:5, n, replace = TRUE)
)

# add a duplicate row + a missing to demonstrate cleaning
df <- bind_rows(df, df[5, ]) %>%
  mutate(s3 = ifelse(row_number() %% 37 == 0, NA, s3))
```

## 2) Clean: consent filter, deduplicate, tidy labels

```r
clean <- df %>%
  filter(consent == 1) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  clean_names()

# overview
janitor::tabyl(clean$condition)
summary(clean$age)
sum(is.na(clean$s3))
```

## 3) Build a scale score + check reliability

```r
scale_items <- clean %>% select(s1:s6)
alpha_out <- psych::alpha(scale_items)
alpha_out$total$raw_alpha

clean <- clean %>%
  mutate(scale_mean = rowMeans(select(., s1:s6), na.rm = TRUE))

# Save alpha to a tidy tibble for reporting
alpha_tidy <- tibble::tibble(
  n_items = ncol(scale_items),
  cronbach_alpha = alpha_out$total$raw_alpha
)
alpha_tidy
```

## 4) Descriptives by condition

```r
desc <- clean %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    age_mean = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    scale_mean = mean(scale_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
    scale_sd = sd(scale_mean, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
desc
```

## 5) Simple comparison (t test) + effect size

```r
tt <- t.test(scale_mean ~ condition, data = clean, var.equal = TRUE)
broom::tidy(tt)

effectsize::cohens_d(scale_mean ~ condition, data = clean)
```

## 6) Quick plot

```r
ggplot(clean, aes(condition, scale_mean)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, alpha = 0.25) +
  labs(x = "Condition", y = "Scale Mean", title = "Scale scores by condition") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## 7) Session info

```r
sessionInfo()
```
